reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Maria, thanks for leaving this review. We understand where you are coming from and appreciate you allowing us the opportunity to further the conversation. As you say, men have historically faced unique challenges in divorce and family law cases, and our mission is to effectively advocate for men and level the playing field. With that being said, we understand that divorce is difficult for all parties, and are proud to have effectively represented many women. While helping men through divorce is our specialty, we offer the same compassion and expertise to clients of all genders and do not only represent men, or discriminate against anyone who needs our services.

Update: They do not have the skills or education to test their clients for dementia: they’re attorneys, not doctors. These people are money-hungry just like all attorneys. Stay away from this place.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is great that you are concerned about your father and do not want him taken advantage of.  I feel the same way about my clients.  I am an experienced elder law attorney with extensive training in working with individuals who are vulnerable adults and may have diminished capacity.  I meet with all potential clients privately to guard against undue influence.  Capacity evaluations are also frequently conducted.  If a potential client lacks capacity, I will not draft any documents for them.  It is unethical for me to do otherwise, and I would not be able to sleep at night.  An adult with capacity is allowed to make decisions for themselves, even if others do not agree.  I always explain all options to my clients and empower them to make the best decision for themselves.

I had a very negative experience with this law office. I initially had a promising consultation on January 23rd and promptly decided to retain their services, making a partial payment towards my retainer fee. However, the subsequent weeks were filled with confusion and frustration.
I encountered numerous issues with payments and account balances. Despite making three payments, the office consistently struggled to locate my account information. When I attempted to make my final payment, I was given conflicting information about the remaining balance. When I questioned the discrepancy, I was met with hostility.
The bookkeeper, instead of clarifying the issue, accused me of using the wrong terminology and ultimately hung up on me. Two hours later, I received a call from a legal assistant informing me that they were dropping me as a client due to my "aggressive tone" and because my case wasn't progressing quickly enough. I was shocked and appalled, as I had not been aggressive or disrespectful. I was simply trying to clarify my account balance and make a payment.
The lack of communication, organizational issues, and the abrupt termination of my case were incredibly unprofessional. If you're considering this law office, be warned: any perceived frustration on your part may be deemed "aggressive" and result in them dropping you as a client. I cannot recommend their services.
